title: Woodluv Grey Wicker Rectangular Storage Gift Hamper Basket With Removable Lining - Large
features: ★ ROBUST CONSTRUCTION - Our storage baskets are made from natural and sustainable wicker in antique grey wash finish.
★ REMOVABLE & WASHABLE LINING - Matching grey liner boasting a little heart accessory and liner is fully removable and washable.
★ MULTI-PURPOSE & VERSATILE USE - Perfect for use as a gift hamper or for extra storage. Perfect for accessories, clothing, beauty products, letters, paperwork and general bits & bobs.
★ SPACE-SAVING BASKETS - It has a rectangle shape, so it won't take up too much floor or Shelf space, but it still has a generous capacity.
★ PRODUCT DIMENSION - (L) 43 x (W) 31 X (H) 15 cm approx.
description: Product Description Rustic Charm: Grey Wicker Shelf Storage Basket with Removable Liner Introducing our versatile multi-Purpose rectangular grey wicker storage basket with lining, a stylish and practical solution for organizing your home while adding a touch of rustic charm. This basket offers durability and timeless appeal, making it a perfect addition to any decor style.
